description: Act as a health data analyst to generate a 'Population Age Pyramid' visualization for a medical practice. Using the MedinTux MySQL database (DrTuxTest on localhost, user root, no password), extract patient birth dates (FchPat_Nee) and sex (FchPat_Sexe) from the fchpat table. Create a Python script named generate_pyramid.py that calculates patient ages and aggregates them into 5-year age groups (0-4, 5-9, etc.) separated by sex. Generate a standard Age Pyramid bar chart with males on the left/negative and females on the right/positive, including a legend and axis labels. Save the chart to ~/Documents/age_pyramid.png and the aggregated data to ~/Documents/age_data.csv with columns: age_group, male_count, female_count.
